title: How About Tomorrow?
description: Adam and Dax discuss web technologies, the internet, and the future of (basically) everything.

title: Over Engineered
description: A podcast where we explore unimportant programming questions (mostly PHP/Laravel/JavaScript) in extreme detail.

title: Scaling DevTools
description: Interviews with the people behind established DevTools like Algolia, SendGrid & AWS. As well as up-and-coming DevTool startups like Neptune.ai and AssemblyAI to find out how side projects become unicorns.

title: No Compromises
description: Two seasoned salty programming veterans talk about best practices based on years of working with Laravel SaaS teams.

title: The Laravel Podcast
description: The Laravel Podcast brings you Laravel and PHP development news and discussion. This season is hosted by Matt Stauffer and Taylor Otwell.

title: The Scrimba Podcast
description: Learn from inspiring developers about how they found meaningful and fulfilling work that also pays them well.

title: Campfire Coders
description: Sitting around an internet campfire, nerdin' out about web development (Laravel, PHP), keyboards, drums, drinks, and who knows what else!

title: Indie Rails
description: Jeremy and Jess host a podcast where they delve into the journeys of indie developers dedicated to the Rails framework, exploring their entrepreneurial spirit and the businesses they've built. Catering to self-starters who value independence but may also enjoy collaboration, this podcast is for those who see Rails as an indispensable tool in their business ventures.

title: Mostly Technical
description: Hosted by Ian Landsman and Aaron Francis, Mostly Technical is a lively discussion on Laravel, business, and an eclectic mix of related topics.

title: No Plans to Merge
description: A comedy podcast masquerading as a show about programming.

title: Syntax.fm
description: A tasty treats podcast for web developers hosted by Wes Bos and Scott Tolinski.

title: North Meets South Web Podcast
description: Jacob Bennett and Michael Dyrynda live on opposite sides of the world, but they don't let a 14.5-hour time difference stop them! In each episode, they share their journey of building their own software product.

title: FSJam Podcast
description: Conversations about the emerging world of Fullstack Jamstack applications. Anthony Campolo and Christopher Burns explore the development practices of the frameworks, libraries, and services enabling this new paradigm.

title: The Technium
description: The Technium is a weekly podcast discussing the edge of technology and what we can build with it. Each week,SriandWilintroduce a big idea in the future of computing and extrapolate the effect it will have on the world.Visit their website.

title: Developers! - mer än bara kod
description: A podcast (in Swedish) by two female software developers: Madde and Sofia.

title: DevOps and Docker Talk
description: Bret Fisher covers Docker and container tools like Kubernetes, Swarm, Cloud Native development, Cloud tech, DevOps, GitOps, DevSecOps, and the full software lifecycle supply chain.

title: APIs You Won't Hate
description: A no-nonsense podcast about API design & development, new features in the world of HTTP, service-orientated architecture, microservices, and probably bikes.

title: Evergreen podcasts
description: These dev podcasts are great but are no longer publishing new episodes.
